messages.title: Everything checked off!

dayCheck.savedText: Saved. Your stats will reflect this.
dayCheck.notesPlaceholder: Anything you want to remember from today (optional)

medium.label: Tough but okay
medium.hint: Busy, but I got through it

bad.label: Hard day
bad.hint: Heavy, low energy, lots of pressure

family: A week without family plans. A dinner, a call, an outing? 🐢
Time with family is the kind that stays with you. Shall we make room?
One small thing this week can mean a lot 🐢
What simple plan could you have with your family this week?
work: It's been a while since you logged any work. Anything worth remembering? 🐢
Is there a meeting or task that deserves a spot on the calendar?
One entry can make the whole week feel clearer 🐢
What's on your work agenda that you haven't added yet?
personal: Your personal time deserves a place on the calendar too 🐢
Something for you this week? An appointment, a hobby, a quiet moment.
Taking care of yourself takes planning too. Want to add something? 🐢
Is there something you want to do for yourself that's still not scheduled?
